note: Discovery batch. Seeded with Bella's 8 gold-standard example channels (real data pulled 2026-07-21). New sourced candidates get appended here. Freshness rule: flag/exclude anyone whose lastUpload is >8 months old.

prospects.name: the diary of jen
prospects.why: Young, fast-growing, personality-led travel vlog — Dolomites/Italy, solo travel, aesthetic. Exactly the persona.

prospects.name: LostwithMaple
prospects.why: New channel, huge views/video. Solo-female van life across Europe — core niche.

prospects.name: Elle Outdoors
prospects.niche: Solo hiking, wild camping & wild swimming
prospects.why: Weekly poster, authentic outdoors storytelling (nature + mental health). Relatable-aspirational.

prospects.name: Kajsa & Lisa
prospects.why: Very active, couple travel + hiking retreats in the Alps. Strong community angle.

prospects.name: The Brown Vanlife
prospects.why: Distinctive van-life couple bringing representation to the niche. Cross-continent travel.

prospects.name: Vera Grace
prospects.why: Cinematic, 'romanticize one destination at a time' — highly on-brand aspirational travel.

prospects.name: Sailing Sea Gypsy
prospects.why: Sailing/liveaboard niche, fast growth (720K views on 29 videos). Real highs-and-lows storytelling.

prospects.name: Graces Adventures
prospects.why: Larger end of the range; solo-female adventure, 'go solo' brand. Strong fit, wide reach.
